title: Doddabasappa Temple, Dambal
tagline: Doddabasappa Temple, Dambal — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Doddabasappa Temple (Kannada: ದೊಡ್ಡಬಸಪ್ಪ ದೇವಸ್ಥಾನ) is a 12th-century Western Chalukyan architectural innovation in Dambal, Karnataka state, India.
overview.description: Doddabasappa Temple (Kannada: ದೊಡ್ಡಬಸಪ್ಪ ದೇವಸ್ಥಾನ) is a 12th-century Western Chalukyan architectural innovation in Dambal, Karnataka state, India. Dambal is about 20 km (12 mi) southeast of Gadag city and 24 km (15 mi) southwest of Ittagi in Koppal district. The sanctum contains a Shiva linga, the symbol of the presiding deity, God Shiva. The temple interior is a standard construction and consists of a sanctum (cella), a vestibule (antarala) and a main mantapa (also called navaranga or hall).

topPlaces.name: Pethalur
topPlaces.description: Pethalur is a village in the Gadag district of Karnataka State in India.

topPlaces.name: Dambal
topPlaces.description: Dambala is a village in the gadag district of the state of Karnataka, India. It was an ancient center of Buddhism and remained so as late as the 12th century.

topPlaces.name: Meundi
topPlaces.description: Mewundi is a village in the Mundaragi tehsil of Gadag district in Karnataka state, India. It is a situated few kilometres from NH-63 on the state highway from Gadag to Mundaragi.

Dambala is a village in the gadag district of the state of Karnataka, India. It was an ancient center of Buddhism and remained so as late as the 12th century.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Doddabasappa Temple, Dambal?
faq.a: The best time to visit Doddabasappa Temple, Dambal is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Doddabasappa Temple, Dambal?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Hubli Airport (74 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (68 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Doddabasappa Temple, Dambal?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Doddabasappa Temple, Dambal at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Doddabasappa Temple, Dambal?
faq.a: Stays in Doddabasappa Temple, Dambal start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Doddabasappa Temple, Dambal?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pethalur, Dambal, Meundi.
